surfaces.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-black/5 z-50 sticky top-0
surfaces.card: bg-white border border-black/5 hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow duration-300
surfaces.admin_card: bg-white border border-black/10 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-black/90 hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-all font-medium flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-black text-black px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-all font-medium
buttons.gold: bg-[#D4AF37] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#B59530] transition-all font-medium

inputs.default: border-b border-black/20 bg-transparent py-3 px-0 focus:outline-none focus:border-black transition-colors rounded-none placeholder:text-black/40
inputs.admin: border border-black/20 rounded-md py-2 px-3 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:border-black

product_card.image: w-full h-full object-cover transition-transform duration-700 group-hover:scale-105
product_card.title: font-heading text-xl text-black

motion.page_transitions: Fade-in with Framer Motion (initial opacity 0, y 20).
motion.hover: Image scale up (105%) on hover, button background/text color transitions.
motion.stagger: Stagger children elements (like product grids) by 0.1s on scroll reveal.

hero_hamper.description: Luxurious gift basket with chocolates and sweets, used for main hero background.

hero_bouquet.description: Premium white and pink peonies in a glass vase, used for floral sections.

category_gift_boxes.description: Two black and white boxes with gold bows, used for featured hampers category tile.

about_florist.description: A vase filled with elegant flowers, used for the About Us or Why Us section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, @phosphor-icons/react, lenis, @radix-ui/react-icons, clsx, tailwind-merge.

Use Shadcn UI for dropdowns, forms, dialogs, and sheets (for cart drawer). Customize the Shadcn components to remove the 'default Vercel look'—make borders 1px solid black/10, remove border-radius (rounded-none for premium feel), and use pure black/white/gold.
Implement 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs).
Header must be sticky with a backdrop-blur-xl.
Typography: Import 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' from Google Fonts in index.css. Use them via Tailwind configured font families.
Layout: Use liberal padding (p-12 to p-24) to create a high-end editorial feel.
Ensure high contrast: text must be easily readable.
Admin Dashboard should use a denser 'Control Room' grid layout and standard Shadcn components for utility.
